[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Shad''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] sent to buy [[Nescan Tal'yo]]'s [[Holocube/Legends|holocube]] off him in the [[Lucky Star (Elerion)|Lucky Star]]. [[Morely]] was his underling, and he reported to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Khorak]].

{{Char-stub}}
